title: Smoky Crumbly Greek Avocado Crumble
description: A smoky and crumbly dish that combines the richness of avocado with a touch of Greek flavors for a nostalgic taste treat. Perfect as a breakfast, snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: avocado
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are creamy and not too firm.

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste, can be omitted for milder version.

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.amount: a few grains of black pepper

ingredients.name: flax seeds
ingredients.notes: To bind and thicken the mixture.

instructions: Blend avocados with lime juice, salt, pepper, smoked paprika until smooth.
Stir in garlic cloves finely minced.
Add ground flax seeds and mix well to create a thick paste.
In a small bowl, mix coconut oil until creamy.
Spread the mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Melt coconut oil if hard, then spread over the top of the avocado paste using a pastry brush or spatula.
Bake at 180°C (350°F) for about 25 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Serve as is or with a dollop of paleo yogurt.
